description: A machine-only negotiation layer enabling agents to agree on tasks, constraints, priorities, and acceptance conditions.

task_description.description: The task being proposed by one agent.

agent_capabilities.description: Capabilities of the receiving agent relevant to the task.

priority_level.description: Urgency or importance of the task.

workflow.action: Receiving agent evaluates task feasibility based on constraints and capabilities.
If needed, agent proposes counter-constraints or modified parameters.
Agents converge on mutually acceptable parameters.
Protocol outputs a deterministic acceptance or rejection packet.
